## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## SDD Checklist
- [ ] `specs/<feature>/spec.md` created or updated.
- [ ] `specs/<feature>/tasks.md` updated.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria mapped to implementation changes.
- [ ] Tests added or updated in `src/test/<feature>/`.
- [ ] `api/model/ui` boundaries preserved.

## Verification
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
